creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Indeed, beta's do not have floppies. You can find them in the 
7.2-RELEASE directory though, if you upgrade after that, you'll be fine. 
I am not very sure whether the 8.0 release will still have floppy 
support, so make sure to upgrade from 7 to 8. Thanks for using FreeBSD!
